tasks.label: Start web server (Windows)

background.endsPattern: Application startup complete\.|Uvicorn running on http://127\.0\.0\.1:8000

tasks.detail: Starts the FastAPI web server from Windows PowerShell with uvicorn.

tasks.label: Stop web server (Windows)
tasks.command: $processIds = @(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique); if ($processIds.Count -eq 0) { Write-Host 'No listening web server found on port 8000.'; exit 0 }; $processIds | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ }; Write-Host ('Stopped web server process(es): ' + ($processIds -join ', '))
tasks.detail: Stops the Windows web server task by terminating whichever process is listening on port 8000.

tasks.label: Restart web server (Windows)
tasks.detail: Stops any existing Windows web server on port 8000, then starts a fresh one.
